# Grace Life Center

> A Spirit-filled church in Laurel, Maryland — a people learning to be with Jesus, become like Jesus, and carry heaven wherever they go. "A well, not a fence." Part of Charismatic Renewal Ministries. You can come and see on a Sunday, or begin the journey online from anywhere. You don't have to believe first to belong.

## Facts
- Name: Grace Life Center (Grace Life Center Charismatic Renewal Ministries)
- Location: 8730 Cherry Lane, Laurel, MD 20707, USA
- Gatherings: Sundays at 10:00 AM — in person and online
- Serving: Laurel, Columbia, Bowie, Beltsville, Savage, Jessup, and Fort Meade, Maryland
- Affiliation: Charismatic Renewal Ministries (a movement born of a 1980 prophetic call to prepare people for a Great Harvest)

## The one thing to know
Grace Life Center is a "well, not a fence." The heart of it is being with Jesus before doing for Jesus — becoming like Him from the inside out, at an unhurried pace, with real people walking beside you. There are two equal doors: come and see in person on a Sunday, or begin the journey online today.

## The Journey (BE → BECOME → BRING)
The discipleship pathway runs Guest → Follower → Disciple-Maker → Leader. You only ever take the next step.
- Welcome Track — learn to be with Jesus (start here): https://gracelifecenter.com/begin
- BECOME® — become like Jesus through the Sermon on the Mount: https://gracelifecenter.com/become
- Disciplers — learn to walk with one person: https://gracelifecenter.com/discipler
- Leaders Track — be formed and sent: https://gracelifecenter.com/leaders

## Pages
- Home: https://gracelifecenter.com/
